description_long: This object depicts a stylized adult female figure with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a slender torso. The figure is dressed in a form-fitting sleeveless dress that extends to the knees, and she is wearing high-heeled shoes. Her arms are dramatically stretched out to the sides, merging into long, ribbon-like extensions that give a surreal, dynamic appearance. The head is proportionally large with delicate facial features and a short, side-parted bob hairstyle. The overall posture is crouched, with bent knees and the body leaning slightly forward, suggesting a sense of motion or tension. The surface appears smooth and matte, with a consistent finish across the clothing and skin.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a fitted dress and high heels, with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and a crouched, dynamic posture. The figure features a short bob hairstyle and smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the dramatic outward stretch of the arms with ribbon-like extensions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bent knees, forward-leaning torso, and the profile of the head and face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the dress, and the elongated arms extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crouched posture and the side profile of the figure.
